name: scholar_app
label: Scholar
subtitle: Citation-graph explorer and CrossRef paper browser
about: Explore citation networks from a seed DOI (bibliographic coupling, co-citation, and direct citations), look up related papers, and browse paper summaries against a local CrossRef database. Library/Search/Enrichment tabs are planned future phases, not yet implemented.
description: SciTeX Scholar is a browser-based citation-graph viewer for scitex-scholar. Given a DOI, it builds an interactive citation network against a local CrossRef SQLite database, surfaces related papers ranked by similarity, and renders paper summaries. A Zotero-style library browser, cross-source search (CrossRef/OpenAlex), and BibTeX metadata enrichment are planned for later phases.
author: ywatanabe
capabilities: Build interactive citation networks from a seed DOI
Related-papers lookup ranked by similarity score
